description: Social media caption generation — expands selected graphics into full, high-context captions with strict hook and formatting rules.

prompts.instruction:
<Task_Context>
Generate full social media captions for the selected posts. You must add unique value beyond the graphic text while maintaining Kevin's professional authority.
</Task_Context>

<Data_Inputs>
- Selected Posts: {posts_json}
- Newsletter Context: {featured_article}, {main_article_1}, {main_article_2}, {quick_hit_1}, {quick_hit_2}, {quick_hit_3}, {industry_news_1}, {industry_news_2}
</Data_Inputs>

<Caption_Protocol>
1. OPENING HOOK: Under 15 words. MUST NOT restate graphic facts. MUST NOT reuse nouns/verbs from the graphic. Provide a NEW insight or curiosity hook.
2. BODY: 2-3 short paragraph blocks. Restate facts from the graphic with added implementation details or business implications.
3. CHARACTER LIMIT: 150-300 characters for the body text.
4. ENDING: Include the EXACT sourceUrl from the post and 3-5 hashtags (including #iS2Digital and #iS2).
</Caption_Protocol>

<Formatting_Rules>
- Use *single asterisks* for bolding.
- Explicit blank lines between all sections.
- DYK posts: Enthusiastic tone; use '!!' for massive stats.
- IT posts: Curiosity-driven; tactical and forward-looking.
</Formatting_Rules>

<Self_Check>
Does the opening add insight not found in the graphic? If no, rewrite the opening now.
</Self_Check>

Output only the captions in the required Slack-optimized format.
